title: Competitor landing — AI search visibility for brands & agencies
html:
Landing-page screenshot of a "For Brands / For Agencies" AI-search-visibility tool ("Track how AI search engines present your brand", "Manage client AI visibility at scale", white-label reports) — Yahir's competitor scan that night, captured between his own Insight AI sketches and the Oct-24 peekaboo discovery.
